[Fetch especial] byte = 00010100  →  MBR = 00010100
H = MBR (extensão com zeros, sem passar pela ULA) = 00000000000000000000000000010100
Controle de memória (WRITE READ) = 11  (fetch — não acessa dados.txt)

--- Registradores no fim do ciclo ---

  OPC  = 00000000000000000000000000000000  (dec = 0)

Memória de dados FINAL:
  [0] = 00000000000000000000000000000000  (dec = 0)
  [1] = 00000000000000000000000000000000  (dec = 0)
  [2] = 00000000000000000000000000000000  (dec = 0)
  [3] = 00000000000000000000000000101010  (dec = 42)
  [4] = 00000000000000000000000000000000  (dec = 0)
  [5] = 00000000000000000000000000101010  (dec = 42)
  [6] = 00000000000000000000000000101010  (dec = 42)
  [7] = 00000000000000000000000000010100  (dec = 20)

> Fim do programa (todas as instruções IJVM foram executadas).
